aliases: Bloque Metro de las Autodefensas Unidas de Colombia
description: Colombian paramilitary front operating primarily in Antioquia department, founded in 1996 by Carlos Mauricio García Fernández (alias 'Rodrigo Doble Cero'). It was part of the ACCU and later the AUC, fighting leftist guerrillas and involved in drug trafficking. The group was dissolved in 2004.
